test.name: Importar tabela CFOP

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.
kw.msg: {"acceptDownloads": false, "ignoreHTTPSErrors": false, "bypassCSP": false, "viewport": {"height": 1080, "width": 1920}, "deviceScaleFactor": 1.0, "isMobile": false, "hasTouch": false, "javaScriptEnabled": true, "offline": false, "hideRfBrowser": false}

{'acceptDownloads': False, 'ignoreHTTPSErrors': False, 'bypassCSP': False, 'viewport': {'height': 1080, 'width': 1920}, 'deviceScaleFactor': 1, 'isMobile': False, 'hasTouch': False, 'javaScriptEnabled': True, 'offline': False, 'hideRfBrowser': False}

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.hom.sped.cloudfiscal.com/SPED_WEB/frmSPED_Login.f1

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text 'FIT@0410' in the given field.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text '2018@FIT#@' in the given field.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector text=CLOUD.SPED at state visible

kw.name: Hover
kw.doc: Moves the virtual mouse and scrolls to the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Hover
kw.doc: Moves the virtual mouse and scrolls to the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Upload File By Selector
kw.doc: Uploads file from `path` to file input matched by selector.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
kw.msg: Error: locator.waitFor: DOMException: Failed to execute 'querySelectorAll' on 'Document': '.form:viewTopo:j_idt16_modal' is not a valid selector. at r (<anonymous>:3:28867) at <anonymous>:3:29005 at t.SelectorEvaluatorImpl._cached (<anonymous>:3:24966) at t.SelectorEvaluatorImpl._queryCSS (<anonymous>:3:28756) at t.SelectorEvaluatorImpl._querySimple (<anonymous>:3:27103) at <anonymous>:3:25713 at t.SelectorEvaluatorImpl._cached (<anonymous>:3:24966) at t.SelectorEvaluatorImpl.query (<anonymous>:3:25546) at Object.query (<anonymous>:3:29404) at <anonymous>:3:28674 =========================== logs =========================== waiting for selector "css=.form:viewTopo:j_idt16_modal" to be visible Failed to execute 'querySelectorAll' on 'Document': '.form:viewTopo:j_idt16_modal' is not a valid selector. ============================================================

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.
